title: An Account of [Muflih 's] Death
description: I have already recounted how Abu Ahmad (al-Muwaffaq (b. al-Mutawakkil departed from Simarri and headed for al-Bagrah to do battle with the cursed one.-1g0 I myself witnessed'99 in Baghdad the army with which Abu Ahmad and Muflih had set out. This was after the news had reached Abu Ahmad and al- Muctamid concerning the atrocities endured by Muslims in al-Bagrah and adjacent territories.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 36
